name: claudemd-curator
description: Curate project-memory artifacts (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .claude/rules/*.md, MEMORY.md). Audits quality against rubric, captures end-of-session learnings, treats Codex AGENTS.md as a peer of CLAUDE.md. Forked from anthropics/claude-plugins-official claude-md-management (Isabella He, Anthropic).
